title: Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners:
Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners!
